name: Roadwardens Order
summary: Institutional road police and escort authority aligned with Shelk’s commitment to safe commerce.
day_to_day: Patrols roads, staffs barracks, escorts caravans, issues route guidance, and secures major gatherings.
who_works_there: Roadwardens, patrol captains, clerks, armorers, stablehands, route officers.
who_uses_it: Travelers, merchants, nobles, pilgrims, settlements depending on safe roads.
authority: Can inspect cargo, enforce road law, and intervene in route disorder or public danger.
public_manifestation: Bright plumes, patrol relays, barracks traffic, checkpoint questions, route notices.
conflict_or_bottleneck: The institution must stay visible enough to deter threats without suffocating the commerce it protects.
